    have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
      exact f.map_add x y
    have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by

    have h₃ : g (f x * f y) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by

    have h₄ : g (f (x * y)) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
      rw [h₂, h₃]
    exact h₄

    have h₁ : f 1 = 1 := by

    have h₂ : g (f 1) = g 1 := by

    have h₃ : g 1 = 1 := by

    have h₄ : g (f 1) = 1 := by
      rw [h₂, h₃]
    simpa using h₄
  
  map_zero' := by

      exact f.map_zero
    have h₂ : g (f 0) = g 0 := by

    have h₃ : g 0 = 0 := by

    have h₄ : g (f 0) = 0 := by
      rw [h₂, h₃]
    simpa using h₄
